skills.name: Anyway, I Won!
skills.description: Scarlet spins a massive pinball around to deal damage to all enemies. Inflicts all enemies with SPD Down for 1 turn with a 75% chance. Reduces this skill's cooldown by 1 turn for each stack of Seven Ball (Undispellable) on self. Resets this skill's cooldown if self has 3 stacks of Seven Ball (Undispellable).

skills.name: High Score!
skills.description: Scarlet triggers Pinball Time! 3 times at the start of the turn, and removes all stacks of Pinball Time! after attacking. Increases self SPD by 1 for each stack of Seven Ball (Undispellable) on self at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 6 times. Normal Ball (Undispellable): Deals 1% increased damage. Seven Ball (Undispellable): Deals 7% increased damage.

levels.description: Scarlet triggers Pinball Time! 3 times at the start of the turn, and removes all stacks of Pinball Time! after attacking. Increases self SPD by 1 for each stack of Seven Ball (Undispellable) on self at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 6 times. Normal Ball (Undispellable): Deals 1% increased damage. Seven Ball (Undispellable): Deals 7% increased damage.
